profile_route.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1264463 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1264463 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-linalg-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|eig_48x48_f64) --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10
profile_route.justification: GEMM2048 remained the top row, but exact-order GEMM micro/layout families were in a rejection streak; selected top non-repeat SVD/pinv private-layout target.

lever.summary: Store the private one_sided_jacobi_svd_real V rotation workspace column-major so each Jacobi rotation streams V columns p/q contiguously, then materialize the same row-major sorted V at the public boundary.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1264463 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1264463 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Jacobi sweep count, p/q pair order, per-row W update order, singular-value total_cmp descending sort, and tie behavior are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The scalar equations for every affected V element remain c*vip - s*viq and s*vip + c*viq with the same input values; only the private address mapping changes.
isomorphism_proof.layouts: The private V workspace is column-major, but v_sorted is materialized back into the prior row-major public layout.
isomorphism_proof.cutoffs: Convergence epsilon, singular-value cutoff, and rcond behavior are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG is added or removed.
isomorphism_proof.special_values: NaN, infinity, and signed-zero propagation remain governed by the same scalar operations and total_cmp calls.
isomorphism_proof.errors: DType, shape, and error surfaces are unchanged.

validation.name: bit-level SVD V layout proof
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-proof-svd cargo test -p fj-lax --lib one_sided_jacobi -- --nocapture

validation.name: public pinv proof
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-proof-pinv cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture

validation.name: crate check
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-check cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

validation.name: crate clippy
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf42-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.name: rustfmt touched-file check
validation.result: failed only on pre-existing unrelated linalg.rs formatting regions; new SVD hunk absent after manual local formatting fix

validation.name: UBS
validation.result: ran with known broad inventory; no unsafe blocks; UBS fmt/clippy/check/test-build subchecks clean

next_profile_note: Reprofile after landing. If GEMM exact-order remains blocked by rejection streak, route to a different profile-backed structural primitive instead of another B-pack/KC micro-retune.
